string.text: Hell of a mess, but resolved

Out of curiosity, you found a module for the memory of a drone that brought you to 4 locators. Having activated them - you randomly opened a spatial bubble! However, you immediately began to think about how to solve this problem and closed it! “He broke - he fixed it himself,” he taught everything like a dad as a child!
The achievement of "Hell of a mess, but resolved."
Sectarian saint
You decided to hand over the Prophet of one of his people, named: Quantum. Since he wanted to overthrow the great leader of the sectarians!
The achievement of the "sectarian saint" was obtained.
The achievement of the "good finale" has been obtained.
The achievement of the "bad ending" has been obtained.
True warrior
You have made a difficult choice in favor of the institute. You have taken all responsibility for what will happen to your brother and friend ...
The achievement of the "faithful warrior" has been obtained.
Motherland, I'm sorry
You have made a difficult choice in favor of your brother. You had to go against the institute, you firmly decided that in such situations not up to the interests of the Motherland.
The achievement of "Homeland, sorry."
Liquidator
You cleaned all the advances of sectarians in the vicinity, thereby showing all the fanatics that they have no place here!
The achievement of the "liquidator" has been obtained.
Good client
You helped the Dan merchant, thereby have become a good friend and now you can count on good discounts in his assortment!
The achievement of a "good client" has been obtained.
Friend of Doc
You helped a stalker doctor with the supply of medicines, thereby your friendship has become stronger!
The achievement of "Friend Doca" has been obtained.
Hallucinogen
It seems that the ejection slightly touched your mental health, so you began to see very strange things: \ n which, probably, only you see!
The achievement of "hallucinogen" has been obtained.
Follower
You have accumulated a lot of information about the leader of the sectarians: the prophet. There are suspicions that you like his sermons!
The achievement of the "follower" has been obtained.
Dungeon simulator
You have already descended into various underground communications so many times, which are quite worthy of such an achievement.
The achievement of the "Dungeon simulator" has been obtained.
Personally living
The sectarians seemed to be subsided in your head, but this did not break your psyche. \ n you are still in good reason!
The achievement of "especially tenacious" has been obtained.
Your new achievement
